title: Viewing Dashboard's in TV Mode
excerpt: Is there a feature that will allow you to cycle through Dashboard widgets in TV Mode? Currently, TV Mode shows the entire board in full screen. Our team would like to be able to cycle through the individual live widgets.…

posts.author: Yonke (Yonke)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a feature that will allow you to cycle through Dashboard widgets in TV Mode? Currently, TV Mode shows the entire board in full screen. Our team would like to be able to cycle through the individual live widgets. See changes/updates in real time, but only one widget at a time, instead of the full board.
